use_cases: Display sending or processing status during form submission
Show loading state for messaging or notification systems
Indicate background operation progress in terminal-style interfaces
Provide status feedback for API or data submission workflows
ai_summary: A terminal-style loading indicator styled as a macOS window with customizable status text. Features a dark gray background, green monospace text, and typical window controls (close, minimize, maximize). Designed to communicate sending or processing states during user actions like form submissions or API calls.
